calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-21-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lisa Sarto.
Mary Bosworth, Esq. for Petitioner: Linh Tran, present as Guardian at litem for: Gordon Phung and Jackie Phung, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $250.00 for each minor is approved.
Money to be deposited in bank account of Petitioner with condition that such funds be expended for benefit of the Claimants.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
